{{Infobox character
| name = Derianatoth
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Derianatoth]] is a [[dragon]] with a feminine voice.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Derianatoth]] is a [[Highgold]] [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Derianatoth]] was webbed up by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Derianatoth]] was set to hunt by the [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“Humans,” she said in a feminine voice, her speech surprisingly clear.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|"You set Derianatoth and Nagatonatoth to hunt, and they too were killed by their prey."<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
